reason: Verified agent chat functionality - agent responded correctly to math question with accurate answer
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with title "Super Agent"
Found agent "QA-20260610-213605-3j2f" in sidebar with status "idle" — Agent was visible and clickable in the "Your Agents" section
Clicked on the agent "QA-20260610-213605-3j2f" — Agent page loaded, showing the agent home with message input field and idle status indicator
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status indicator showed "idle" which is acceptable per test requirements
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was successfully typed into the message input field and sent using the Send button
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Activity indicator disappeared after 2 seconds, indicating agent completed processing

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Agent responded with exactly "4", which correctly answers the math question 2+2=4. Screenshot saved as page-2026-06-10T21-36-59-237Z.png showing the conversation with the correct response
